tool_args.label: New York City Transit Committee Members
tool_args.raw_text: Members of the New York City Transit Committee include: • Haeda Mihaltses, Chair • Andrew Albert • Samuel Chu • Dan Garodnick • David Jones • Meera Joshi • John Ross 'JR' Rizzo • John Samuelsen • Lisa Sorin • Midori Valdivia

tool_args.label: Automated Camera Enforcement (ACE) Program
tool_args.raw_text: Automated Camera Enforcement (ACE) on 34 routes in partnership with DOT and the New York City Department of Finance (NYC DOF). As of November 29, all routes have transitioned from the warning period to issuing violations. Bus lane speeds on routes increased, on average, by 5% as well as a 20% reduction in collisions and a 5-10% estimated reduction in emissions.

payload.description: Activated ACE on 34 routes in partnership with NYC DOT and NYC DOF. As of November 29, all routes transitioned from warning period to issuing violations. Bus lane speeds increased on average by 5%, 20% reduction in collisions, 5-10% estimated reduction in emissions. Covers 1,000 buses.

tool_args.label: 96th Street Redesign Bus Priority Project
tool_args.raw_text: NYC DOT announced the completion of a major redesign of Manhattan's 96th Street, aimed at enhancing bus service speed and reliability and improving commutes for the 15,500 weekday riders along the M96 and M106 routes. The project adds 1.7 miles of bus lanes on both the Upper East and Upper West sides on the stretch from Second Avenue to West End Avenue and includes offset and curbside bus lanes in both directions to prevent vehicle blockages, pedestrian safety improvements, left-turn bays to streamline traffic flow, neighborhood loading zones, and treatments to reduce turning speeds for drivers.

payload.description: NYC DOT completion of a major redesign of Manhattan's 96th Street, adding 1.7 miles of bus lanes on both the Upper East and Upper West sides from Second Avenue to West End Avenue. Includes offset and curbside bus lanes in both directions, pedestrian safety improvements, left-turn bays, neighborhood loading zones, and treatments to reduce turning speeds. Serves 15,500 weekday riders on M96 and M106 routes.

tool_args.label: Congestion Pricing
tool_args.raw_text: Congestion Pricing is a historic moment for our city, and come January 5, New York City Transit will be ready to roll. the subway has added 1,200 additional scheduled trips every week, with frequency improvements targeted on off-peak, weekend, and overnight periods. over two dozen local and express bus routes will receive additional trips and improved service in 2025.

payload.description: Historic moment for NYC. MTA added 1,200 additional scheduled trips every week with frequency improvements on 1, 3, 5, 6, B, C, D, G, J, M, N, and R lines. Benefits estimated 2.9 million subway riders on weekends and ~800,000 riders on weekdays. Over two dozen local and express bus routes to receive additional trips in 2025. Funds accessibility upgrades at several subway stations including Gates Avenue in Brooklyn.

tool_args.label: Crosstown G Train CBTC Installation
tool_args.raw_text: We saw the successful completion of Crosstown G Train CBTC installation project. We provided world-class transportation service despite the G train being shut down over the summer. Riders were met with an incredible service plan that had buses running between Brooklyn and Queens every few minutes.

payload.description: Successful completion of CBTC installation on the Crosstown G line. Despite G train shutdown over summer, provided world-class transportation service with buses running between Brooklyn and Queens every few minutes.

tool_args.label: A Train Rockaways Winter Work
tool_args.raw_text: our planned work on the A train in the Rockaways this winter. There will be 24/7 shuttle bus service. We're adding extra express bus service. In partnership with our colleagues at the Long Island Rail Road, we're able to offer Rockaway customers a heavily discounted ticket for service on and off the peninsula.

payload.description: Planned work on the A train in the Rockaways. 24/7 shuttle bus service, extra express bus service, heavily discounted LIRR tickets for Rockaway customers, dedicated shuttle across peninsula while bridge out of service. Coupled with planned CBTC installation in 2025-2029 capital plan.

tool_args.label: Queensboro Plaza Accessibility Project
tool_args.raw_text: the newest accessible station in the New York City Transit network was unveiled in Long Island City at Queensboro Plaza on the N, W, and 7 lines. This critical station is the sixth NYCT station to be made accessible in 2024

payload.description: Newest accessible station unveiled in Long Island City at Queensboro Plaza on the N, W, and 7 lines. ~$69 million construction cost from federal sources. Two new elevators, mezzanine expanded by 2100 sq ft, new platforms, lighting, security cameras, pedestrian bridges, additional stairs. Sixth NYCT station made accessible in 2024.

tool_args.label: Zero Emission Bus Fleet - Battery Electric Buses Purchase
tool_args.raw_text: goal of operating a 100 percent zero emission bus fleet by 2040, the MTA awarded the purchase of more than 250 new 40-foot Battery Electric Buses (BEBs) that will operate along multiple routes throughout the city. This purchase builds on the 60 standard 40-foot BEBs coming to various depots this year and 205 BEBs slated to arrive late next year.

payload.project_name: Zero Emission Bus Fleet - BEB Purchase
payload.description: Goal of operating 100% zero emission bus fleet by 2040. MTA awarded purchase of more than 250 new 40-foot Battery Electric Buses (BEBs). Builds on 60 standard 40-foot BEBs coming to various depots this year and 205 BEBs slated to arrive late next year. Each bus will reduce GHG emissions by upwards of 90 metric tons annually. Electric buses running out of Charleston Depot in Staten Island.

tool_args.label: R211 Subway Car Program
tool_args.raw_text: Hundreds of brand-new R211 cars entered service this year, now making up the majority of the A line fleet. The nation's first open-gangway cars are in service on the C line. Currently, 320 R211 cars are in service, with more on the way.

payload.description: Hundreds of brand-new R211 cars entered service in 2024, now making up the majority of the A line fleet. Nation's first open-gangway cars in service on the C line. 320 R211 cars in service, with more on the way.

tool_args.label: Student OMNY Card Program
tool_args.raw_text: Student OMNY cards have been put into the hands of New York City public school students for the first time. Now, millions of students have access to transportation for their after-school, weekend, and summer activities.

payload.description: Student OMNY cards put into the hands of NYC public school students for the first time, giving millions access to transportation for after-school, weekend, and summer activities.

tool_args.label: Reduced-Fare OMNY Upgrade Program
tool_args.raw_text: we also began the process of upgrading all of our Reduced-Fare customers to OMNY. 1.5 million Reduced-Fare OMNY cards are in the mail. With the launch of Student OMNY and Reduced-Fare OMNY, we have expanded OMNY services to approximately 3 million people.

payload.description: Upgrading all Reduced-Fare customers to OMNY. 1.5 million Reduced-Fare OMNY cards in the mail. Expanded OMNY services to approximately 3 million people including Student OMNY and Reduced-Fare OMNY.

tool_args.label: November 2024 Subway Weekday OTP
tool_args.raw_text: For November 2024, weekday On-Time Performance (OTP) was 82.9%, the second highest of any month in 2024

tool_args.label: November 2024 Subway Weekend OTP
tool_args.raw_text: weekend OTP remained high at 85.9%

tool_args.label: November 2024 Subway CJTP
tool_args.raw_text: The percentage of customers arriving at their destinations within five minutes of schedule (CJTP) was 84.5%

tool_args.label: November 2024 Elevator Availability
tool_args.raw_text: November's elevator availability was 98.2%, within 0.1% of the 12-year high reached last month.

tool_args.label: November 2024 Bus SD
tool_args.raw_text: In November, Service Delivered (SD) reached 95.3%, falling 0.5% short of October and 0.1% below November 2023

tool_args.label: November 2024 Bus CJTP
tool_args.raw_text: Customer Journey Time Performance (CJTP) was 68.4%, 1.7% lower compared to November 2023

tool_args.label: November 2024 Bus Speed
tool_args.raw_text: November bus speeds averaged 7.9 mph, matching October 2024 and November 2019, slightly down by 1.3% from November 2023.

tool_args.label: Average Weekday Paid Subway Ridership November 2024
tool_args.raw_text: Average weekday paid subway ridership stood at 3.93 million, up 4.3% from November 2023.

tool_args.label: Average Weekday Paid Bus Ridership November 2024
tool_args.raw_text: the average weekday seeing 1.43 million

tool_args.label: Midweek Paid Bus Ridership November 2024
tool_args.raw_text: 1.47 million on midweek days

tool_args.label: NYC Marathon Weekend Subway Ridership November 2024
tool_args.raw_text: a new record was set for weekend ridership on November 2 and 3, the weekend of the NYC Marathon, with 5.42 million for the total weekend

tool_args.label: Marathon Sunday Subway Ridership November 2024
tool_args.raw_text: 2.6 million on Marathon Sunday itself

tool_args.raw_text: Total completed trips in November 2024 increased by 20% compared to November 2023

tool_args.label: Water Main Break at 103 Street
tool_args.raw_text: On November 27, a city water main broke at 102 Street and Central Park West. Service along Central Park West had to be completely suspended. Within 5 hours, we had service completely restored.

payload.description: City water main broke at 102 Street and Central Park West. Service along Central Park West completely suspended. Service restored within 5 hours.

tool_args.label: Power-Related Incident Brooklyn
tool_args.raw_text: On December 11, a power-related incident severely impacted our service in Brooklyn.

payload.description: Power-related incident severely impacting service in Brooklyn. Hundreds of crew members worked around the clock to make repairs and restore service.

tool_args.label: Congestion Pricing Launch Date
tool_args.raw_text: Congestion Pricing will go live on January 5.

payload.description: Congestion Pricing will go live on January 5.

tool_args.label: Queensboro Plaza Accessible Station Unveiling
tool_args.raw_text: Last week, the newest accessible station in the New York City Transit network was unveiled in Long Island City at Queensboro Plaza

payload.description: Newest accessible station unveiled in Long Island City at Queensboro Plaza. Sixth NYCT station made accessible in 2024.

tool_args.label: NYC Marathon Weekend Ridership Record
tool_args.raw_text: a new record was set for weekend ridership on November 2 and 3, the weekend of the NYC Marathon

payload.description: New record for weekend subway ridership set with 5.42 million for the total weekend and 2.6 million on Marathon Sunday.

tool_args.label: Fare Evasion Rate on Buses
tool_args.raw_text: In 2020, nearly 21% of bus riders didn't pay their fare. That number was recently registering near 50%.

payload.claim_text: In 2020, nearly 21% of bus riders didn't pay their fare. That number was recently registering near 50%.
payload.subject: bus fare evasion

tool_args.label: Fare Evasion Revenue Loss 2022
tool_args.raw_text: In 2022, we lost about $315 million to fare evasion on buses and $285 million in subway fares.

payload.claim_text: In 2022, we lost about $315 million to fare evasion on buses and $285 million in subway fares.
payload.subject: fare evasion revenue loss

tool_args.label: Major Felony Crime November 2024
tool_args.raw_text: In November 2024, Major Felony Crime was up 19% month-over-month but down 16% versus November 2023.

payload.claim_text: In November 2024, Major Felony Crime was up 19% month-over-month but down 16% versus November 2023. Crime increased by 8% when compared to the 2023 monthly average.
payload.subject: major felony crime in subway

tool_args.label: Transit Crime Down 2024 vs 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Even accounting for an increase in January, overall transit crime is down 6.3% in 2024 compared to 2023.

payload.claim_text: Even accounting for an increase in January, overall transit crime is down 6.3% in 2024 compared to 2023.
payload.subject: transit crime

tool_args.label: Preliminary Bus Fare Evasion Rate
tool_args.raw_text: With preliminary bus fare evasion roughly 45% the average weekday ridership would be approximately 2.6 million.

payload.claim_text: With preliminary bus fare evasion roughly 45% the average weekday ridership would be approximately 2.6 million.
payload.subject: bus fare evasion percentage

tool_args.label: Platform Barrier Pilot 14 Stations
tool_args.raw_text: We've scaled up our platform barrier pilot to 14 stations, providing customers with comfort and confidence while waiting on crowded platforms. In recent months, we've improved the design of these barriers with sleek stainless steel.

payload.description: Platform barrier pilot scaled up to 14 stations. Improved design with sleek stainless steel in recent months.

tool_args.label: Subway Car Camera Installation
tool_args.raw_text: Our subway car camera installation is 99% complete, and we are on schedule to reach our goal of 100% of all subway cars being camera-equipped by the end of the year.

payload.description: Subway car camera installation 99% complete, on schedule to reach 100% of all subway cars being camera-equipped by end of 2024.

tool_args.label: LED Lighting in Subway Stations
tool_args.raw_text: brighter LED lights are now illuminating nearly 200 subway stations, saving the MTA money and making stations safer.

payload.description: Brighter LED lights are now illuminating nearly 200 subway stations, saving the MTA money and making stations safer.
